issues.message: Inconsistent verbs are used to create secondary objects. Sinks use `create-sink` whereas schedules use `add-schedule`.
Inconsistent verbs are used to delete secondary objects. Sinks use `delete-sink` whereas schedules use `remove-schedule`.

Inconsistent output format flags are used. The client `todo` query commands use `--output` while the daemon `todod status` uses `--format` (all query commands must consistently support `--format` or `-f`).
Listing commands (`sinks`, `schedules`) output JSON formatting by default instead of a tabular structure.
Table column headers printed by `todo list` are not rendered in bold.
Table column headers cannot be hidden via `--no-headers` flag.
Daemon status and stop commands use `failed` error messages instead of `cannot`.
Exact time is formatted using a custom Go layout rather than ISO 8601 when `--rfc3339` is absent.
